name: skill-system-local
description: Skill System role-based plugin packages (local marketplace).

plugins.name: skill-system-core
plugins.description: Skill System core — shared operational platform (routing, planning, memory/knowledge, loop, search broker, validation/reporting contract, task state) used by all role plugins.

plugins.name: skill-system-design
plugins.description: Skill System design — UI/UX, design system, visual QA, layout/component mapping for the design role.

plugins.name: skill-system-dev
plugins.description: Skill System dev — analysis, implementation, refactoring, codebase understanding, failure recovery for the engineering role.

plugins.name: skill-system-maintainer
plugins.description: Skill System maintainer — Skill System self-management: routing eval, usage telemetry, skill lifecycle.

plugins.name: skill-system-quality
plugins.description: Skill System quality — acceptance, test strategy, regression/review gates for the QA/QC role.

plugins.name: skill-system-research
plugins.description: Skill System research — literature, hypothesis, experiment, statistics, manuscript, paper evidence for the research role.
